title: bidens sulphurea
intro: Bidens sulphurea, also known as Swamp Marigold or Green-headed Beggar-ticks, is a flowering plant native to eastern North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, as it has been traditionally used to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and alleviate symptoms associated with fever and colds. The health benefits of Bidens sulphurea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Bidens sulphurea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of ailments.
